case_title: LEANN MEI-AI YU VS. TANISHA LESHAE WILLS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY YU, LEANN MEI-AI AS TO DEFENDANT WILLS, TANISHA LESHAE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YU, LEANN MEI-AI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-04-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLS, TANISHA LESHAE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WILLS, TANISHA LESHAE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, LEANN MEI-AI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLS, TANISHA LESHAE $1,135.75 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.75, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE IS A TOTAL LOSS WITH A VALUE OF $2065.00. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 45% COMPARITIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR BODILY INJURY IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, LEANN MEI-AI AS TO DEFENDANT WILLS, TANISHA LESHAE
